items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: Sanhua.

items.speaker: Sanhua
items.text: Yes, Madam Magistrate.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: I will be going on a temporary leave. During my absence, please help me handle my responsibilities in Jinzhou.

items.speaker: Sanhua
items.text: Understood. Should I continue protecting that Rover?

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: No need. Both Changli and I will be away, and there'll be more than enough paperwork for you to handle.

items.speaker: Sanhua
items.text: Is Lady Changli leaving for the capital?

items.speaker: Sanhua
items.text: Please pardon my intrusion, but {Male=he;Female=she} just faced an ambush in the Central Plains. What if...

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: Regarding that incident... We tried to warn {Male=him;Female=her} about the Fractsidus, but they were more cunning than we thought.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: If {Male=he;Female=she} runs into another powerful enemy like Scar, {Male=he;Female=she}'ll eventually have to confront them on {Male=his;Female=her} own.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: Sanhua, you can place more trust in Rover and me.

items.speaker: Sanhua
items.text: Understood. I will.

items.speaker: Sanhua
items.text: My lady... No matter what happens, my sword is always yours.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: Both the interrogation and my appointed meeting with Rover have already finished.
Scar only needed the two of you as his audience. We already knew what he wanted, and we let him have as much.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: {Male=He;Female=She} decrypted every message we intended to convey. It's only proper you meet {Male=him;Female=her} in person, as the one who crafted those puzzles.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: Such intricate puzzles... I guess only Rover has the patience to solve them all.
No detail is too small. I'm sure {Male=he;Female=she} understands. Besides... Not seeing the opponent heightens the thrill of the game.
If everything goes according to the prophecies of Jué, I will meet {Male=him;Female=her} in person eventually.
So... What did our captive from the Fractsidus tell you about Jué?

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: ...That Jué had predicted I will have to fight it one day. A fight that will shape Jinzhou's future.
Well, that is... unexpected. But you don't seem all that surprised, do you?

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: Can't say I am. I had suspected as much from our previous conversations, and the message it left me... His words only confirmed it.
Where was it when you last sensed its presence?

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: It was... In Mt. Firmament. Unlike Jinzhou city, that mountain is still resting in "stillness."
The place where the first people of Jinzhou lived, and where Jué first manifested before us humans... I see.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: I'll find Jué and bring it back as soon as possible.
Our enemies could have planned it as a trap. We have a bigger goal to focus on, remember?

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: I understand. I will not let anything or anyone disrupt the peace in Jinzhou.
Would you let what you heard from Scar sway your determination?

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: No, he cannot ever turn me against Jué. If anything, his words only confirmed my theory.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: I am the Magistrate of Jinzhou, appointed by the Sentinel itself.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: The prophecy speaks of a decisive incident for Jinzhou's future, where I will be a key player. The fight between me and Jué is only a precursor.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: My job remains unchanged. I will fulfill my duty as Jinzhou's Magistrate with my own judgment.
And that's your final answer?

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: A single strand's neglect births mountainous upheaval. You taught me that, remember?

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: The safest option is for me to go in person.

items.speaker: Changli
items.text: ...Very well.

items.speaker: Changli
items.text: Since we are already mid-game, I will let you decide our next move.

items.speaker: Changli
items.text: This time, I shall be a pawn in your hand.

items.speaker: Changli
items.text: Remember I will always stand by your side, in this crisis or any other.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: ...Am I a player or a mere pawn? I suppose there is no difference at this point.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: No matter what, I will do what I must.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: It's been three days.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: We've both made it on time.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: Allow me to formally introduce myself. I am Jinhsi. It brings me great joy to see you, Rover.

options.text: Hello.
Why wait three days to meet me in person?
Did something happen?
I hope I'm not talking to another projection.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: To show up as a projection again would be ill-mannered of me. Please rest assured, it is a real human in the flesh you're speaking to. Despite Huanglong's advanced technology, such a realistic projection is still impossible.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: Or perhaps you would like to verify it?

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: Jinhsi smiles genuinely and offers her hand to you, radiating calmness and sincerity.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: ...It is nothing to be concerned about.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: An emergency forced me to leave, and I only had the time to prepare some tokens for you. Please pardon my lack of hospitality.

options.text: Does that emergency have something to do with the Fractsidus?
Does that emergency have something to do with your Sentinel?

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: ...Yes. The Sentinel of Jinzhou is currently absent.

options.text: Aren't they supposed to stay in their domains?

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: Correct.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: The Sentinels guide and guard humanity as a symbol of our civilization.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: When a region's Sentinel goes absent, chaos is bound to ensue. As this news could lead to civil unrest, please keep it a secret.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: Jinzhou's Sentinel, "Jué," is being held captive by the Fractsidus. I had to postpone our meeting and put all my effort into finding its whereabouts.

options.text: I heard you can resonate with the Sentinel?

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: Yes, our thoughts are connected to a certain degree. I can sense its memories, feelings, and surroundings, though not very clearly.

options.text: Have you found it yet?

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: Unfortunately, I haven't. I can feel Jué is in danger. The good news is, I have figured out the culprit behind all of this.

options.text: Is it Scar?

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: Precisely.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: The Fractsidus plans to advance another Lament and cause disasters worldwide.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: Overseer Scar had several objectives upon infilrtrating Jinzhou.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: To track you down, to test your strengths, and to make you join their cause. To abduct Jué and to resurrect the Threnodian in advance.

options.text: Why me?

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: They must have discovered your value, likely from one of Jué's prophecies. If you join them, they'll gain significant power.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: Should you refuse to join, the Fractsidus will likely want to eliminate you so you don't get in their way.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: I have a plan to apprehend Scar. Once we capture him, the Fractsidus won't be that much of a threat to you for the time being.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: If you are willing to lend us a hand, I will ensure your safety during our cooperation.

options.text: Count me in.
Can I have some time to think?

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: Thank you for your trust, Rover.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: Of course. Your decision is valued, Rover.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: Speaking of which, you seem to have already gathered a lot from the tokens.

options.text: The mangosteen points to how people lived through the wars in Jinzhou.
The sugar pearl points to past epidemics and disasters.
The leaf points to the Fractsidus.
The sundial points to when and where we are meeting.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: Impressive, Rover.

options.text: And I learned more about my identity as I deciphered the tokens.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: The threat Jinzhou is facing is far worse than meets the eye.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: One of the Threnodians will soon be reawakened...

options.text: What are the Threnodians?

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: They are the enemies of human civilizations, born from the dark side of our collective consciousness. We must defeat them to protect all of humanity.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: We have been doing our best to prevent the disaster, but the Fractsidus is accelerating the Threnodian's revival.

options.text: And it has something to do with me, yes?

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: Indeed.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: You have defeated the Crownless and absorbed its Echo with your bare hands. It is the Tacet Discord that embodies the concept of warfare.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: Resentment of the fallen, fright of the ignoble... Those are the emotions that laid grounds for its birth.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: The Crownless is a Tacet Discord that possesses powers from the reviving Threnodian.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: Jinzhou is a border city with an unbreakable will and strong spirit of resistance. However, we also fear the constant wars and loss of life, and the Threnodian can prey on that.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: You, however... You were able to defeat and absorb a Threnodian-related Tacet Discord with your bare hands, and resonate with other TDs.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: Meanwhile, Huanglong's records mention a hero with similar powers who saved our nation during the Threnodian War. {Male=He;Female=She} is also mentioned in literature dating back to Jinzhou's establishment.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: To uncover your true identity, this could be a helpful lead to pursue.

options.text: You believe that person and I could be related in some way?

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: Yes. Based on my own deduction, and the prophecies of Jué.

options.text: Jué... In the Gorges of Spirits...

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: You mean... The unfinished statue of Jué?

options.text: I remembered something when I saw it...
But I'm not sure if that really happened.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: I see. Do you mind letting me know what you remembered? Since it's related to our Sentinel, I might be able to help.
You tell Jinhsi about the fragmented memories you were able to remember.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: Rover, the memories of which you speak...

options.text: Yes? Anything worth noting about them?

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: As I mentioned earlier, I can resonate with Jué, our Sentinel. Your recollections... They align with what I've witnessed in Jué's memories.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: Yes, I do remember seeing something similar... I believe it had truly happened in the past.

options.text: In other words...

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: In other words, you may be the person mentioned in our records.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: The unwavering presence by our Sentinel's side, bonded by an unbreakable trust.

options.text: I don't reckon Resonators can live that long.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: Resonators tend to have a longer lifespan, but it is indeed unprecedented to live hundreds of years without any sign of aging.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: So many mysteries about you remain unsolved, and your age is just one of the unknowns.

options.text: If this is true, who was I all that time ago?
Then how did I end up losing my memories?

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: Sorry, but I don't know. Jué's last piece of information pointed to the Norfall Barrens, where you should find the Threnodian.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: I pray you will find your answers there.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: A Threnodian is resurrecting, and our nation is in grave danger. This reminds me of the Threnodian War all too much. Perhaps... This has something to do with your mysterious appearance in Jinzhou?

options.text: You mean I showed up to protect Jinzhou like the historical hero did?

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: Not really. I don't plan to believe in a hero showing up out of nowhere and protecting us.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: I am just presenting whatever lead I have about your past, as I know it is troubling you. I want to help you, and that is all there is to it.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: Thank you for considering lending us a hand. Your help is much appreciated, but please do not feel obligated because of the information I shared.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: They are my people, and the responsibility to keep them safe should fall on no one else but my own shoulders.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: I am saying this because I have faith in my abilities, and even more so in the bravery of Jinzhou's soldiers and our people.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: You deserve to make your own decision about this after uncovering your true identity.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: I appreciate everything you've done for us, during the past few days, or perhaps even longer ago.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: Once it all settles, I am ready to accommodate and assist in whatever future decision you make. You can leave Jinzhou, or the entire Huanglong if you wish.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: If you ever need me again, you need only ask.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: Let's keep this a secret between the two of us. How does that sound?

options.text: What did Scar tell you?

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: ...Sorry, Rover. What he mentioned about our Sentinel is... highly sensitive. I cannot disclose it yet, not before verifying it myself.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: Is it a ploy to create distrust among us, or... I must first find our Sentinel to uncover the truth.

options.text: How important is Jué to Jinzhou?

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: Jué is the Guardian Sentinel of Jinzhou. It is responsible for assisting Jinzhou's Magistrate in administrative affairs.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: While I am final decision maker... Without the assistance of Jué, I cannot guarantee I'm always making the best choices for my people.

options.text: You seem to be doing well enough on your own.
Why are you so sure Jué is always right?

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: T-Thank you. I am glad you think so.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: Jué can predict the future, and up to this point, every one of its prophecies have been proven true.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: Jué can predict the future, and up to this point, every one of its prophecies have been proven true.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: While justice may not be universally agreed upon, its decisions have consistently served the best interests of Huanglong.

options.text: Perhaps it left to set Jinzhou's future right.
Perhaps it intended to let you make your own decisions.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: For that... I suppose we will have to talk to it in person to find out.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: In addition, Rover, Jué once told me to deliver a message to you.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: "To the Awakened One: When raindrops fall upstream, please head to the Norfall Barrens, and seek General Jiyan of the Midnight Rangers."

options.text: So I'll need to find this General Jiyan?
So I'll need to go to the Norfall Barrens?

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: I suppose so. General Jiyan is currently battling another TD Outbreak in the Norfall Barrens, which will also serve as our frontline against the Threnodian.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: But the ongoing war has made it a very dangerous place to go.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: Since you won't need to go there right now, not until when the "raindrops fall upstream"...

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: I know you're here for clues about your true identity, and I don't want you to leave the city empty-handed.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: Have you heard about the Black Shores, Rover?

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: It's an organization shrouded in mystery, with a secretive membership process and members who usually keep their identities hidden.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: Upon your awakening, one of their members discreetly contacted me to gather information about you.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: But please don't worry. The Black Shores developed a special Lament prediction system, and has established partnerships with countries worldwide.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: While operating in secrecy, they are not an extremist group like the Fractsidus.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: They have been monitoring the situation in Jinzhou to provide assistance when needed.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: Thanks to their extra help, my meeting with you went smoothly.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: This Blake Bloom is their symbol. The Black Shores members usually wear it on their person.

options.text: What do they want to achieve in Jinzhou?
There sure are a lot of people keeping an eye on me.
Wouldn't that make them easy to spot?

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: The Black Shores once provided us significant insights into the relationship between the moon and Threnodians.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: This time, they've come to inform us a Threnodian is about to resurrect near Jinzhou.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: Apart from that, I am not sure what else they may be hoping to achieve.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: Rover, after the recent series of events, I trust you have gained a general idea of who you might have been.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: Before you fell into that deep slumber, you likely played a significant role in important historical events, shaping the course of history in some way.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: Ultimately... I suppose it is up to you to discover the final definitive answer for yourself.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: Yes, I suppose it does make them stand out. On the other hand, they presumably possess extraordinary abilities to stay anonymous.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: This photo is yours to keep. I will return with Jué shortly, and the Black Shores may be worth your try during this time.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: Scar, you are now under arrest for committing multiple felonies in Huanglong. Do you have anything to say?

items.speaker: Scar
items.text: What do I want to say, huh? While I'd love to tell you another story... I guess that's not what you want to hear.

items.speaker: Scar
items.text: Let's cut to the chase, “Madam Magistrate.” I'm getting bored already.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: Very well. You will answer only our questions from now on.

items.speaker: Scar
items.text: Sure, why not. What do you want to know?

options.text: Why did you kidnap Jué?
Why are you obsessed with reviving the Threnodian?
What on earth is the Lament?
Why were you following me?
I'm done with him.

items.speaker: Scar
items.text: A <ano=Oracle Engine>Sentinel</ano> such as Jué can predict and "correct" future events. It gets in our way of achieving our sublime vision.

items.speaker: Scar
items.text: We merely wanted to topple the set future built on lies, and take control of our own destiny.

items.speaker: Scar
items.text: The Threnodians... They hold the key to our ideal.

items.speaker: Scar
items.text: Together they will bring us the promised "true Lament," and we will embrace the new world that is bound to come.

items.speaker: Scar
items.text: What is the Lament? Disaster? Curse? Some kind of punishment? Ha! People only see the surface...

items.speaker: Scar
items.text: The Lament brings death, destruction, and countless Reverberations.

items.speaker: Scar
items.text: Reverberations that will be reflected, overlapped, and interwoven during the Lament... They will be our salvation, the only path to a new lifeform and a new civilization.

items.speaker: Scar
items.text: Our goal has always been the same... We want you. Want you to join us.

options.text: Why me?
And if I say no?

items.speaker: Scar
items.text: Forces battle over you, causing all this strife, and yet you remain unaware of your own worth... Are you really that naive, or are you just dense?

items.speaker: Scar
items.text: Whatever. Our interest in you is not affected by such trivial matters.

items.speaker: Scar
items.text: Too bad. We will then be forced to kill you, by any means necessary...

items.speaker: Scar
items.text: But I'm sure you'll willingly come to us... When the time arrives.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: You kidnapped Jué and revived the Threnodian, accelerating the next Lament... This is proof enough that you are the enemy of Jinzhou, and all humanity.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: Stop dreaming you can force Rover to join you. {Male=He;Female=She} is our honored guest, and I will not allow any harm to come {Male=his;Female=her} way.

items.speaker: Scar
items.text: Ha! How confident you sound. As the Threnodian's resurrection approaches, Jinzhou is barely holding on. How much longer do you think you can keep up this facade?

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: Thank you for your concern. We have crushed your schemes once, and we can do it again.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: I have one last question for you. Abducting "Jué," stalking Rover, and setting up an ambush in Qichi Village... You couldn't have accomplished that all on your own.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: Unless...

items.speaker: Scar
items.text: Unless I'm not the only Overseer in Jinzhou, right? Hahaha...

items.speaker: Scar
items.text: I have answered all your questions with full honesty. I don't mind you knowing, because it won't make any difference.

items.speaker: Scar
items.text: You can try to stop us with all you have... But it's too late to change the course of history.

items.speaker: Scar
items.text: Now, I have one question for you...

items.speaker: Scar
items.text: You seem convinced we caused the disappearance of Jué... What if I told you there was more to it? Would you be curious?

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: About Jué... What else do you know?

items.speaker: Scar
items.text: Come closer and I'll tell you, Madam Magistrate... It's a secret for your ears only...

items.speaker: Sanhua
items.text: How dare you! Madam Magistrate, I...

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: No, it can't be...

items.speaker: Scar
items.text: Shocked, aren't you? But there's more...

items.speaker: Scar
items.text: What if I told you... Your Sentinel had made this prophecy a long, long time ago?

items.speaker: Scar
items.text: Your all-seeing Sentinel abandons you now of all times. Need I say more?

items.speaker: Scar
items.text: We're merely adding a touch of extra fuel to the fire that will soon consume all.

items.speaker: Scar
items.text: Rover, care for a wager? I know you've been searching for answers about your past, and I've got news for you—

items.speaker: Sanhua
items.text: Watch out!

items.speaker: Scar
items.text: You are one of us, the "black lambs," and you have been chosen to join us ushering in the new world...

items.speaker: Scar
items.text: Once you discover what you really are, you will come to us with no hesitation.

items.speaker: Scar
items.text: The Fractsidus awaits your arrival with open arms.

items.speaker: Scar
items.text: And I look forward to that day in sincere anticipation...

items.speaker: Scar
items.text: Hehehehehe.... AHAHAHAHAHA!
After the interrogation, Scar is put in jail...

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: Rover! Are you all right?

options.text: I saw something... I was wearing the Blake Bloom...

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: I see... The Black Shores must have a deep connection to your past.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: Since you are likely being closely monitored by the Fractsidus now...

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: I suggest keeping an eye out for the Black Shore members. They could prove to be your valuable allies.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: I'll do my best to find Jué, and tell you everything I learned from it once I return.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: This is my promise.

options.text: I'm counting on you.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: Yes. Please leave it to me.
